description: User scrolls down within the 'Filter Opportunities' modal to view more options.
frame_description: The user is navigating through the filter options in the modal.

description: User clicks the 'X' button to close the filter modal.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the close icon in the top right of the modal.

description: User scrolls down the 'Explore' page to the 'Sessions to schedule' section.
frame_description: The page content shifts upwards as the user scrolls.

description: User scrolls down further on the 'Explore' page to view more opportunities.
frame_description: The user continues to scroll down the feed.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the 'Explore' page.
frame_description: The page content shifts downwards as the user returns to the top of the list.
